summary: Static verification (no dotnet SDK in sandbox) of the DuplicateDetected two-button split (Download + Email) feature for MedicalApp ASP.NET Core MVC. All 8 static checks from the review request pass.

static_verification_results.1_helper_extracted: PASS - TryRegenerateReportPdfAsync(int id) exists at line 276-338 in ProfilesController.cs. Returns (byte[]? pdfBytes, string? fileName, IActionResult? errorResult). Contains DB history lookup (AsNoTracking + Status=='success' + UserEmail==CurrentEmail), JsonSerializer.Deserialize<InterpretationResult> with case-insensitive options, freemium gating (Credite==0 => isFreemium=true), and _pdfGenerator.Generate(result, LocalizedLabels.ForCurrentUi(), isFreemium).
static_verification_results.2_downloadreport_thin: PASS - DownloadReport(int id) at lines 189-203 is now ~14 lines: session guard on CurrentEmail, calls helper, returns errorResult if set, else `return File(pdfBytes!, "application/pdf", fileName!)` (3-arg overload => Content-Disposition:attachment).
static_verification_results.3_emailreport_action: PASS - EmailReport(int id, int? profileId=null) at lines 212-264 has [HttpPost] + [ValidateAntiForgeryToken], session guard, calls helper, captures lang from CultureInfo.CurrentUICulture.TwoLetterISOLanguageName up-front (line 225), builds HTML body with Loc.T for EmailGreeting/ResultEmailIntro/ResultEmailAttachedNote/Tagline/EmailRegards, calls _emailService.SendEmailWithAttachmentAsync(CurrentEmail, subject, htmlBody, pdfBytes!, fileName!). On exception: TempData[ErrorMessage]=EmailSendFailedTryDownload, redirects to History(profileId) or Interpretation/Upload. On success: TempData[SuccessMessage]=string.Format(Loc.T("DupEmailSentFmt",lang), CurrentEmail) and same redirect logic.
static_verification_results.4_view_two_buttons: PASS - DuplicateDetected.cshtml lines 63-79: `.d-grid.gap-2` container with (a) <a asp-controller="Profiles" asp-action="DownloadReport" asp-route-id="@Model.ExistingHistoryId" class="btn btn-primary" data-testid="btn-download-existing-report">, and (b) inline <form asp-action="EmailReport" method="post"> with @Html.AntiForgeryToken(), hidden id + profileId, submit button data-testid="btn-email-existing-report" class="btn btn-outline-primary w-100". Right-hand ReInterpret column (line 83+) unchanged.
static_verification_results.5_loc_keys: PASS - All 5 new keys (DupDownloadTitle, DupSendByEmailTitle, DupEmailSentFmt, ErrReportCannotBeReconstructed, ErrPdfGenerationFailed) exist exactly 7 times each (one per language). Full parity confirmed: each of en/ro/fr/es/de/it/pt has exactly 1010 unique keys.
static_verification_results.6_iemailservice_unchanged: PASS - IEmailService.cs line 7 exposes SendEmailWithAttachmentAsync unchanged.
static_verification_results.7_brace_balance: PASS - ProfilesController.cs {=188 }=188, Loc.cs {=1140 }=1140, DuplicateDetected.cshtml {=23 }=23. All diffs = 0.
static_verification_results.8_old_selector_removed: PASS - grep for `btn-open-existing-report` across /app/MedicalApp/ returns zero matches. New selectors `btn-download-existing-report` and `btn-email-existing-report` present only in DuplicateDetected.cshtml (lines 67, 75).

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: EmailReport uses `string.Format(Loc.T("DupEmailSentFmt", lang), CurrentEmail)` — verify all 7 language strings contain a single `{0}` placeholder to avoid FormatException at runtime (couldn't runtime-test without dotnet SDK).

Minor: The error-path redirect in EmailReport goes to Interpretation/Upload when profileId is null; consistent with review spec. Consider whether the DuplicateDetected view always posts profileId — it does (hidden input on line 73 with @Model.ProfileId), so the null branch is defensive but unlikely.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sandbox has no dotnet SDK — only static/grep verification possible. User builds & runs on VS2026 locally. Iteration 8 feature: DuplicateDetected page split single 'Open existing report' button into 'Download' (force-attachment) + 'Email' (regenerate & mail). All 8 acceptance checks passed. If a future agent gets dotnet: run the app and hit /Profiles/DownloadReport/{id} (expect Content-Disposition:attachment header) and POST /Profiles/EmailReport with antiforgery token.
